label: Ritual outcome effect
description: Defines the outcome effects, quality comps, and associated data for a ritual. Referenced by RitualPatternDef via ritualOutcomeEffect.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# class that implements the ritual outcome effect logic. Must extend RitualOutcomeEffectWorker.

startingQuality.label: Starting quality
startingQuality.description: Initial quality value before comps are applied.

minQuality.label: Min quality
minQuality.description: Minimum clamped quality value after all comps are applied.

maxQuality.label: Max quality
maxQuality.description: Maximum clamped quality value after all comps are applied.

givesDevelopmentPoints.label: Gives development points
givesDevelopmentPoints.description: If true, completing this ritual awards ideo development points.

memoryDef.label: Memory def
memoryDef.description: ThoughtDef applied to participants as a default memory, independent of any specific outcome chance.

outcomeChances.label: Outcome chances
outcomeChances.description: List of weighted outcome possibilities. The chance values should sum to 1.0.

honorFromQuality.label: Honor from quality
honorFromQuality.description: SimpleCurve mapping ritual quality (X) to royal honor awarded (Y). Only relevant for Royalty rituals.

extraPredictedOutcomeDescriptions.label: Extra predicted outcome descriptions
extraPredictedOutcomeDescriptions.description: Additional localized strings shown in the predicted outcome list in the ritual UI.

extraInfoLines.label: Extra info lines
extraInfoLines.description: Additional localized strings shown as informational lines in the ritual outcome UI.

extraOutcomeDescriptions.label: Extra outcome descriptions
extraOutcomeDescriptions.description: List of extra outcome chance descriptions shown in the UI, each optionally referencing a method to compute a quality-dependent display value.

effecter.label: Effecter
effecter.description: EffecterDef spawned at the ritual location when the ritual completes.

fleckDef.label: Fleck def
fleckDef.description: FleckDef spawned across the ritual area when the ritual completes.

flecksPerCell.label: Flecks per cell
flecksPerCell.description: Number of fleck instances spawned per cell of the ritual area.

fleckRotationRange.label: Fleck rotation range
fleckRotationRange.description: FloatRange controlling the random initial rotation of each spawned fleck. Defaults to 0~360.

fleckScaleRange.label: Fleck scale range
fleckScaleRange.description: FloatRange controlling the random scale of each spawned fleck. Defaults to 1~1.

fleckVelocityAngle.label: Fleck velocity angle
fleckVelocityAngle.description: FloatRange controlling the random velocity direction (degrees) of each spawned fleck. Defaults to 0~0.

fleckVelocitySpeed.label: Fleck velocity speed
fleckVelocitySpeed.description: FloatRange controlling the random velocity speed of each spawned fleck. Defaults to 0~0.

filthDefToSpawn.label: Filth def to spawn
filthDefToSpawn.description: ThingDef (filth) spawned across the ritual area when the ritual completes.

filthCountToSpawn.label: Filth count to spawn
filthCountToSpawn.description: IntRange controlling how many filth instances are spawned. Defaults to 0~0.

comps.label: Comps
comps.description: List of quality modifier comps evaluated during and after the ritual to compute the final quality. Each li element selects a comp class via the Class attribute.

warnOnLowQuality.label: Warn on low quality
warnOnLowQuality.description: If true, the game shows a warning letter when the ritual quality is low.

allowAttachableOutcome.label: Allow attachable outcome
allowAttachableOutcome.description: If true, a RitualAttachableOutcomeEffectDef can be attached to this ritual outcome to add bonus effects.

allowOutcomeWithNoAttendance.label: Allow outcome with no attendance
allowOutcomeWithNoAttendance.description: If true, the ritual can produce an outcome even if no pawns attended. Defaults to false.
